summary: I'm Jamie—a curious, people-loving (97% extrovert!) People Operations professional who thrives on solving problems through data analysis, building scalable processes and programs grounded in evidence, and partnering cross-functionally for sustainable impact. I increasingly use AI and automation to eliminate manual work—through human-centered, systematic design.

bullets.text: Serve as primary point of contact across {coord|20+ concurrent onboarding and program initiatives}, 10+ vendors, and multiple stakeholders—tracking completion and ensuring high-quality delivery on timelines
Redesign and standardize manual {ex|onboarding processes} using {tools|systems and feedback analysis}, identifying inefficiencies and implementing scalable solutions
Build and maintain {prog|SOPs, guides, and a self-service knowledge base} for 70+ {cross|cross-functional} staff, reducing onboarding time by 75%
Run needs assessments with 25+ {cross|stakeholders} and facilitate training and orientation for 600+ participants, driving a 78% program enrollment rate
Facilitate CEO/HR discovery interviews to diagnose absenteeism, then {data|analyze} 300+ leave cases—surfacing $362K in costs that drove policy redesigns
Conduct focus groups and 1:1 interviews with an NGO leadership team to surface decision-making and {cross|accountability} gaps and recommend process changes
Analyzed 2,000+ {data|employee experiences} to surface satisfaction drivers and guide C-suite decisions on where to focus
Led a manager-effectiveness initiative, transforming {data|feedback data} into actionable reports that informed engagement strategies
Prepared and presented insights to senior leadership on DEI, Inclusive Leadership, and performance review
Improved {ex|employee experience} via 5 {cross|cross-functional} projects on survey development, rewards & recognition, and L&D
Optimized {ex|onboarding} across 3 global locations via process analysis and clarifying job responsibilities across the employee lifecycle
Improved new-hire experience by streamlining immigration and relocation processes through close {cross|coordination} with immigration attorneys and cross-functional teams
Supported organizational change by helping direct a Mergers & Acquisitions project, migrating and merging employee {data|records}
Assisted in employee relations cases, ensuring compliance with local labor laws and confidentiality
Developed proficiency across various HR functions, ranging from recruitment and compensation to performance management
Filled a challenging international role by drafting job descriptions, posting openings, and researching global compensation details
Engaged global talent via personalized {cross|communication} and customer service, increasing applications by 566% in 2 months
Organized recruiting events and moderated panels with C-suite at top 3 universities, reaching 230+ students and 80+ applicants
